leadText: The Tropical Shell (Japanese: なんごくかいがら Tropical Shell) is a valuable item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Tropical Shell serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A beautiful white shell that may have drifted from a sea in a warm region.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A beautiful white shell that may have drifted from a sea in a warm region. Your buddy was probably drawn to its beauty!
